message.content:
@startuml
hide footbox
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign left
skinparam shadowing false

actor Administrative

participant ":AddScooterUI" as AddScooterUI
participant ":AddScooterController" as AddScooterController
participant ":Pharmacy" as Pharmacy
participant "ls:ListScooters" as ListScooters
participant "sc:Scooter" as Scooter
participant "bat:Battery" as Battery
database "scdb:ScooterDB" as ScooterDB
database "batdb:BatteryDB" as BatteryDB

Administrative -> AddScooterUI : 1 begins the process of adding a scooter
AddScooterUI -> Administrative : 2 asks for the necessary data(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
Administrative -> AddScooterUI : 3 inserts the solicited data

AddScooterUI -> AddScooterController : 4 newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate AddScooterController

AddScooterController -> Pharmacy : 5 ls = getListScooters()
activate Pharmacy
Pharmacy --> AddScooterController : 5 ls
deactivate Pharmacy

AddScooterController -> ListScooters : 6 sc=newScooter(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate ListScooters

ListScooters -> Scooter : 7 create(id_Scooter, qrCode, status, id_Battery, capacity)
activate Scooter

Scooter -> Battery : 8 create(id_Battery, capacity)
activate Battery

Battery -> Battery : 9 validateBattery(bat)
deactivate Battery

deactivate Scooter

AddScooterController -> ListScooters : 10 validateScooter(sc)
deactivate ListScooters

AddScooterUI --> Administrative : 11 validates the data, presents it and asks the administrator for its confirmation
Administrative -> AddScooterUI : 12 confirms

AddScooterUI -> AddScooterController : 13 registerScooter()
activate AddScooterController

AddScooterController -> ListScooters : 14 registerScooter(sc)
activate ListScooters

ListScooters -> ListScooters : 15 validateScooter(sc)
ListScooters -> ListScooters : 16 addScooter(sc)
ListScooters -> Scooter : 17 save(sc)
activate Scooter

Scooter -> ScooterDB : 18 save(sc)
activate ScooterDB
deactivate ScooterDB

Scooter -> BatteryDB : 19 save(bat)
activate BatteryDB
deactivate BatteryDB

deactivate Scooter
deactivate ListScooters
deactivate AddScooterController

AddScooterUI --> Administrative : 20 adds the scooter to a list of scooters

@enduml
